# PERF-067 negative: gin.New() paired with gin.Recovery()
lang: go
file: PERF-067-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func BuildRouterWithRecovery() *gin.Engine {
	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(gin.Recovery())
	r.GET("/ping", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.String(200, "pong")
	})
	return r
}
